summary: Employee Classification Feature - All tests passed. Backend APIs (18/18) and Frontend UI verified successfully.
passed_tests: test_classification_summary_returns_data - GET /api/hr/classification-summary returns breakdown with workflow rules
test_classification_summary_has_all_5_classifications - All 5 types: permanent, probation, trainee, freelancer, channel_partner
test_classification_summary_has_workflow_guidance - Workflow guidance for each classification type
test_classification_summary_has_eligibility_flags - is_salary_eligible, is_stipend_eligible, is_incentive_eligible, is_statutory_exempt flags
test_employees_classifications_returns_grouped_data - GET /api/hr/employees/classifications returns grouped employees
test_employees_classifications_has_rules - Returns classification_rules with salary/stipend/incentive eligibility
test_update_classification_success - PUT /api/hr/employees/{user_id}/classification updates and logs history
test_update_classification_invalid_type - Rejects invalid classification types with 400 error
test_classification_history_returns_data - GET /api/hr/employees/{user_id}/classification-history returns history
test_classification_history_has_rules - History response includes classification rules
test_salary_cycles_filters_to_salary_eligible - GET /api/finance/salary-cycles filters to permanent/probation only
test_salary_cycles_include_all_flag - include_all=true returns all classifications
test_salary_payment_rejects_trainee - POST /api/finance/salary-payments rejects trainee with clear error
test_stipend_payment_rejects_permanent - POST /api/finance/stipend-payments rejects permanent employees
test_incentive_accepts_permanent_employee - POST /api/finance/incentives accepts permanent/probation/trainee
test_incentive_rejects_freelancer - POST /api/finance/incentives rejects freelancer/channel_partner
test_salary_processing_rejects_trainee - POST /api/finance/salary-processing rejects non-salary-eligible
test_cleanup_test_incentives - Cleanup verification
UI: Classifications tab displays 5 classification cards with counts and workflow badges
UI: Payment Workflow Rules (Enforced) section shows rules for all 5 classifications
UI: Classification change modal shows dropdown with all 5 options and warning messages
UI: Classification history modal shows change history with from/to badges and timestamps
UI: History and Change buttons available for each employee (95 each)
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed incentives during classification validation tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Employee Classification feature fully implemented and tested. Features verified: 1) 5 employee classifications (permanent, probation, trainee, freelancer, channel_partner), 2) Classification-based payment routing (Salary for permanent/probation, Stipend for trainee, Commission for freelancer/channel_partner), 3) Automatic statutory deduction rules (PF/ESI for permanent/probation, exempt for others), 4) Salary-cycles endpoint filters to salary-eligible employees only, 5) Salary/Stipend/Incentive APIs enforce classification rules with clear error messages, 6) UI shows Classifications tab with cards, workflow rules, change modal with dropdown, and history modal. All 95 employees are currently classified as 'permanent'.

frontend_ui.classifications_tab: Shows 5 classification cards with counts and workflow badges
frontend_ui.workflow_rules_section: Shows Payment Workflow Rules (Enforced) for all classifications
frontend_ui.change_modal: Dropdown with all 5 options, warning messages, Update Classification button
frontend_ui.history_modal: Shows from/to badges, changed by, timestamps
